title: Design System: William A. Ingram — Academic Portfolio

display.purpose: Page titles; text-wrap: balance; 1.82rem on mobile.

headline.purpose: Ruled section openers — hairline top border with 1.35rem padding above; 1.45rem on mobile.

title.purpose: Subsections in Deep Printer's Blue; scroll-margin-top 5rem.

lede.purpose: Standfirst paragraphs in Lede Ink, max 68ch.

label.purpose: Copper page kickers; sentence case, never uppercase.

shadows.name: portrait
shadows.purpose: The system's only shadow, under the framed profile portrait (The Portrait Exception). Dark theme: 0 6px 14px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.28).

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Hero and primary actions; deepens to Deep Printer's Blue on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: #165c7d; color: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #165c7d; border-radius: 0.3rem; padding: 0.62rem 0.95rem; min-height: 2.75rem; font-family: "Avenir Next", "Segoe UI", Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 680; letter-spacing: 0; line-height: 1.2; cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #0e3f59; border-color: #0e3f59; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid #c17a2d; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary actions; fills solid Printer's Blue on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: transparent; color: #165c7d; border: 1px solid #165c7d; border-radius: 0.3rem; padding: 0.62rem 0.95rem; min-height: 2.75rem; font-family: "Avenir Next", "Segoe UI", Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 680; letter-spacing: 0; line-height: 1.2; cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: #165c7d; color: #ffffff; } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid #c17a2d; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Masthead
components.description: The constant ink-dark band: square WAI monogram, name, links with an active white pill. Identical in both themes.
components.html: WAIWilliam A. IngramHomePublicationsResearch
components.css: .ds-masthead { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 1rem; flex-wrap: wrap; background: #16202a; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12); min-height: 4.2rem; padding: 0.6rem 1rem; font-family: "Avenir Next", "Segoe UI", Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; } .ds-masthead-brand { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.7rem; } .ds-masthead-mark { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 2.15rem; height: 2.15rem; border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.34); color: #ffffff; font-size: 0.82rem; font-weight: 800; } .ds-masthead-name { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.95); font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 700; } .ds-masthead-links { display: inline-flex; gap: 0.25rem; } .ds-masthead-link { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.72); text-decoration: none; font-weight: 650; font-size: 0.95rem; padding: 0.5rem; border-radius: 0.25rem; } .ds-masthead-link:hover { color: #ffffff; } .ds-masthead-link:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid #c17a2d; outline-offset: 3px; color: #ffffff; } .ds-masthead-link.ds-active { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); color: #ffffff; }

components.name: Nav Card
components.description: Research-overview wayfinding card: copper eyebrow over a demibold title; hover deepens the wash, never lifts.
components.html: Research areaMachine-usable scholarly knowledge
components.css: .ds-nav-card { display: block; background: #eef4f7; border: 1px solid #d7e0e7; border-radius: 0.3rem; color: #0e3f59; padding: 0.85rem 0.95rem; text-decoration: none; font-family: "Avenir Next", "Segoe UI", Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; max-width: 16rem; } .ds-nav-card-kicker { display: block; color: #9b5c22; font-size: 0.88rem; font-weight: 680; margin-bottom: 0.2rem; } .ds-nav-card strong { display: block; font-weight: 680; line-height: 1.35; } .ds-nav-card:hover { background: #e2edf2; border-color: #aec4d1; } .ds-nav-card:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid #c17a2d; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Tag Chip
components.description: Post tag: washed fill, hairline border, deep-blue label.
components.css: .ds-tag { display: inline-block; background: #eef4f7; border: 1px solid #d7e0e7; border-radius: 0.25rem; color: #0e3f59; font-family: "Avenir Next", "Segoe UI", Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 0.86rem; font-weight: 650; line-height: 1.25; padding: 0.18rem 0.42rem; }

components.name: Page Hero
components.description: White panel opened by a 4px Printer's Blue bar: copper kicker, display title, lede.
components.html:
Scholarly AI, digital libraries, and research infrastructure

Scientific Knowledge Infrastructure

How scientific knowledge and research outputs become machine-usable for discovery, reasoning, and reuse.
components.css: .ds-page-hero { background: #ffffff; border-top: 4px solid #165c7d; border-bottom: 1px solid #d7e0e7; padding: 1.5rem 1.35rem; font-family: "Avenir Next", "Segoe UI", Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; color: #192633; } .ds-page-hero-kicker { color: #9b5c22; font-size: 0.98rem; font-weight: 760; letter-spacing: 0; margin: 0 0 0.45rem; } .ds-page-hero-title { font-size: 2.35rem; font-weight: 680; line-height: 1.15; letter-spacing: 0; margin: 0 0 0.85rem; } .ds-page-hero-lede { color: #263847; font-size: 1.14rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.65; margin: 0; max-width: 68ch; }

components.name: Bibliography Entry
components.description: The signature: bracketed tabular counters in a fixed Pencil gutter, hairline-separated citation rows.
components.html:
1. Learning from LLM Disagreement in Retrieval EvaluationW. A. Ingram, E. A. FoxJCDL 2025
  2. Evaluating Human-LLM Alignment in ETD Subject ClassificationH. Klair, W. A. IngramTPDL 2025
components.css: .ds-bibliography { list-style: none; counter-reset: ds-pub; margin: 0; padding: 0; max-width: 46rem; font-family: "Avenir Next", "Segoe UI", Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; color: #192633; font-size: 1rem; } .ds-bibliography li { counter-increment: ds-pub; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.1rem; position: relative; padding: 0.9rem 0 0.9rem 3.45rem; border-bottom: 1px solid #d7e0e7; line-height: 1.45; } .ds-bibliography li::before { content: "[" counter(ds-pub) "]"; position: absolute; left: 0; top: 0.95rem; width: 2.6rem; text-align: right; color: #6f7d89; font-size: 0.95rem; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; } .ds-bib-title { font-weight: 680; line-height: 1.4; } .ds-bib-title a { color: #165c7d; text-decoration: underline; text-decoration-thickness: 0.08em; text-underline-offset: 0.16em; } .ds-bib-title a:hover { color: #0e3f59; } .ds-bib-title a:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid #c17a2d; outline-offset: 3px; } .ds-bib-authors { color: #2d3c49; line-height: 1.45; } .ds-bib-venue { color: #4f6070; line-height: 1.45; }

components.name: Evidence Strip
components.description: Three hairline-divided facts of record: Pencil label over demibold value. A table of record, not stat cards.
components.html:
RoleAssociate Professor, Virginia Tech
LeadershipAssociate Dean and Executive Director for IT
ResearchDirector, CDRS
components.css: .ds-evidence-strip { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr)); border-top: 1px solid #d7e0e7; border-bottom: 1px solid #d7e0e7; font-family: "Avenir Next", "Segoe UI", Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; color: #192633; } .ds-evidence-strip > div { padding: 1rem 1.1rem; } .ds-evidence-strip > div + div { border-left: 1px solid #d7e0e7; } .ds-evidence-label { display: block; color: #6f7d89; font-size: 0.86rem; font-weight: 680; margin-bottom: 0.25rem; } .ds-evidence-strip strong { display: block; font-weight: 680; line-height: 1.35; }

narrative.overview:
The site is a quiet library reading room: cool paper light, dark iron-gall ink, and one warm note of bookbinder copper, like brass lamp fittings against blue-grey walls. Nothing performs. The room's credibility comes from how well it is kept — hairline rules where structure is needed, tabular numerals where figures align, generous margins where reading happens. It is the natural habitat of both halves of the record this site carries: the scholar's publications and the library leader's institutional trust.

The working mood is quiet rigor: composed, exacting, unhurried, quietly warm. Restraint is the credibility — nothing decorative that isn't also informative. Hierarchy, spacing, and notation do the persuading; color arrives in small, deliberate doses. The one theatrical gesture the system allows itself is the scholarly notation itself: bracketed citation numerals, ruled section openings, a 4px blue bar over every hero — the marks of a well-kept record used as interface.

The system explicitly rejects its two failure modes (confirmed anti-references): generic Bootstrap blandness — Bootstrap is the chassis here, never the visible skin — and flashy startup-AI styling, whose gradients and glow would spend the trust this site exists to earn.
keyCharacteristics: Cool paper surfaces with iron-gall ink text, every color a first-class light/dark pair
Structure drawn with hairline rules and tonal surface steps — lines, not boxes or shadows
Native humanist sans (Avenir Next stack) at precise demibold weights; tabular numerals for every figure
One warm note: bookbinder copper kickers in a cool blue system; amber reserved for focus rings
Citation brackets as interface — the scholarly record's own notation, load-bearing
Sturdy, legible controls: 44px targets, firm fills, small radii

rules.name: The Masthead Rule
rules.body: The masthead stays Masthead Ink (#16202a) in light and dark themes alike — a constant institutional band across the top of every page. Only its contents (white-alpha text, borders, and pills) are tuned; the band itself never lightens, tints, or themes.

rules.name: The Portrait Exception
rules.body: Surfaces never cast shadows. The one shadow in the system sits under the profile portrait — a square-cornered photograph in a 3px white frame, hung like a print on the wall. It marks the person, and nothing else, as the object with physical presence.

rules.name: The Citation Bracket Rule
rules.body: Scholarly numbering is set in brackets with tabular figures — [1], [2] — right-aligned in a fixed gutter, in Pencil. Bibliographies, highlight lists, and footnote marks all speak this notation. It is the mark of the scholarly record and is load-bearing identity: never replace it with bullets, cards, or bare numerals.

dos: Do define every color as a paired light/dark --wai-* custom property in css/main.css; both themes are first-class, and the System/Light/Dark switcher must keep working.
Do draw structure with hairline rules (1px Ruled Line, #d7e0e7) and tonal surface steps (Cool Paper → Page White → Paper Wash) — lines over boxes.
Do keep font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums on dates, counters, and citation markers.
Do keep interactive targets at least 2.75rem tall and give every focusable element the 3px Amber Bookmark outline at 3px offset.
Do hold the reading measures: 78ch content column, 72ch body, 68ch ledes and listings.
Do route Bootstrap through the token bridges (--bs-border-color, --bs-code-color) so the chassis never shows stock colors.
donts: Don't lighten, tint, or theme the masthead; it stays Masthead Ink (#16202a) in both themes (The Masthead Rule).
Don't remove the bracketed [n] tabular counters from bibliographies and highlight lists, or the bracketed footnote marks (The Citation Bracket Rule).
Don't add shadows to surfaces; the portrait's soft shadow is the single exception (The Portrait Exception).
Don't load hosted webfonts for text; type stays on the native Avenir Next / Segoe UI stack.
Don't reach for startup-AI styling — gradient meshes, glassmorphism, glow effects, novelty motion; credibility here is typographic, not atmospheric.
Don't let Bootstrap defaults show through (stock blue links, default focus rings, unthemed borders); generic Bootstrap blandness is a confirmed anti-reference.
